<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing the change -->

## Type

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî New feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî Build, CI, dependency updates
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî Test additions or fixes

## Related

<!-- Link to issue, CR, or discussion. Use "Closes #123" to auto-close. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` ‚Äî zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` ‚Äî zero warnings
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` ‚Äî all files formatted
- [ ] `pnpm test` ‚Äî all tests pass
- [ ] `pnpm cdk synth` ‚Äî synthesis succeeds
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
